en: The proverbs of Solomon, son of David, king of Israel:
zh: 大衛的兒子以色列王所羅門的箴言：

en: To know wisdom and instruction, to understand words of insight,
zh: 要使人曉得智慧和教訓， 了解充滿哲理的言語；

en: to receive instruction in wise dealing, in righteousness, justice, and equity;
zh: 使人領受明慧的教訓， 就是公義、公正和正直；

en: to give prudence to the simple, knowledge and discretion to the youth-
zh: 使愚蒙人變成精明， 使少年人獲得知識和明辨的能力；

en: Let the wise hear and increase in learning, and the one who understands obtain guidance,
zh: 使智慧人聽了，可以增長學問， 使聰明人聽了，可以獲得智謀；

en: to understand a proverb and a saying, the words of the wise and their riddles.
zh: 使人明白箴言和譬喻， 懂得智慧人的言詞和他們的隱語。

en: The fear of the LORD is the beginning of knowledge; fools despise wisdom and instruction.
zh: 敬畏耶和華是知識的開端， 但愚妄人藐視智慧和教訓。

en: Hear, my son, your father's instruction, and forsake not your mother's teaching,
zh: 我兒，要聽從你父親的教訓， 不可離棄你母親的訓誨。

en: for they are a graceful garland for your head and pendants for your neck.
zh: 因為這些要作你頭上的華冠， 作你頸上的金鍊。

en: My son, if sinners entice you, do not consent.
zh: 我兒，如果壞人引誘你， 你不可隨從他們。

en: If they say, "Come with us, let us lie in wait for blood; let us ambush the innocent without reason;
zh: 如果他們說：“你跟我們來吧！ 我們要埋伏流人的血， 我們要無故地潛伏傷害無辜的人；

en: like Sheol let us swallow them alive, and whole, like those who go down to the pit;
zh: 我們要好像陰間一般，把他們活生生吞下， 他們整個被我們吞下，如同下坑的人一樣；

en: we shall find all precious goods, we shall fill our houses with plunder;
zh: 這樣，我們必得著各樣貴重的財物， 把掠物裝滿我們的房子。

en: throw in your lot among us; we will all have one purse"-
zh: 加入我們的行列吧！ 我們大家共用一個錢袋。”

en: my son, do not walk in the way with them; hold back your foot from their paths,
zh: 我兒，不可和他們走在一起， 禁止你的腳走他們的路；

en: for their feet run to evil, and they make haste to shed blood.
zh: 因為他們的腳奔向邪惡， 他們急於流人的血。

en: For in vain is a net spread in the sight of any bird,
zh: 在飛鳥眼前張設網羅， 是徒勞無功的。

en: but these men lie in wait for their own blood; they set an ambush for their own lives.
zh: 他們埋伏，是自流己血； 他們潛伏，是自害己命。

en: Such are the ways of everyone who is greedy for unjust gain; it takes away the life of its possessors.
zh: 凡是貪愛不義之財的，所走的路都是這樣； 那不義之財奪去了貪財者的性命。

en: Wisdom cries aloud in the street, in the markets she raises her voice;
zh: 智慧在街上呼喊， 在廣場上揚聲；

en: at the head of the noisy streets she cries out; at the entrance of the city gates she speaks:
zh: 在鬧市中心呼叫， 在城門口發出言語，說：

en: "How long, O simple ones, will you love being simple? How long will scoffers delight in their scoffing and fools hate knowledge?
zh: “你們愚蒙人喜愛愚蒙， 好譏笑的人喜歡譏笑， 愚昧人恨惡知識，要到幾時呢？

en: If you turn at my reproof, behold, I will pour out my spirit to you; I will make my words known to you.
zh: 你們要因我的責備回轉， 我就把我的心意 向你們傾吐， 把我的話指示你們。

en: Because I have called and you refused to listen, have stretched out my hand and no one has heeded,
zh: 我呼喚，你們不肯聽從； 我伸手，沒有人理會。

en: because you have ignored all my counsel and would have none of my reproof,
zh: 你們既輕忽我的一切勸告， 不肯接受我的責備；

en: I also will laugh at your calamity; I will mock when terror strikes you,
zh: 所以你們遭難的時候，我就發笑； 驚恐臨到你們的日子，我就嗤笑。

en: when terror strikes you like a storm and your calamity comes like a whirlwind, when distress and anguish come upon you.
zh: 驚恐臨到你們好像風暴， 災難如同颶風來臨， 患難困苦臨到你們身上。

en: Then they will call upon me, but I will not answer; they will seek me diligently but will not find me.
zh: 那時，他們必呼求我，我卻不回答； 他們切切尋找我，卻尋不見；

en: Because they hated knowledge and did not choose the fear of the LORD,
zh: 因為他們恨惡知識， 不選擇敬畏耶和華；

en: would have none of my counsel and despised all my reproof,
zh: 不接受我的勸告， 輕視我的一切責備；

en: therefore they shall eat the fruit of their way, and have their fill of their own devices.
zh: 所以，他們必自食其果， 必飽嘗自己所設計謀的傷害。

en: For the simple are killed by their turning away, and the complacency of fools destroys them;
zh: 愚蒙人的背道必殺害他們自己， 愚昧人的安逸必毀滅他們自己；

en: but whoever listens to me will dwell secure and will be at ease, without dread of disaster."
zh: 唯有聽從我的，必安然居住， 得享安寧，免受災禍的驚恐。”
